instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall engage the torque converter clutch when vehicle speed exceeds the lock-up threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall engage the torque converter clutch when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Lockup_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Gear_Position < Third_Gear THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Command = Engage THEN Monitor_TCC_Slip

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage the torque converter clutch during low vehicle speed conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disengage the torque converter clutch when Vehicle_Speed falls below Unlock_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed < Unlock_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Vehicle_Speed >= Unlock_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Gear_Position < Third_Gear THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall engage the torque converter clutch during steady cruising.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall engage lock-up when engine speed and vehicle speed fall within cruising limits.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed BETWEEN Cruise_Min_RPM AND Cruise_Max_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed > Cruise_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Engine_Speed > Cruise_Max_RPM THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage the torque converter clutch during high throttle demand.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall unlock the torque converter clutch when throttle demand exceeds Throttle_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Throttle_Position <= Throttle_Limit AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Throttle_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Gear_Position < Third_Gear THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor slip conditions of the torque converter clutch.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disengage lock-up when TCC_Slip exceeds Slip_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip <= Slip_Limit AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF TCC_Slip_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip > Critical_Slip THEN Trigger_TCC_Fault
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage lock-up during acceleration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall unlock the torque converter clutch when acceleration exceeds Acceleration_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Acceleration > Acceleration_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Vehicle_Acceleration <= Acceleration_Limit AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Gear_Position < Third_Gear THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Acceleration_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage torque converter lock-up during braking.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall release lock-up when Brake_Pedal_Status is active.

L4_requirements: IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Vehicle_Speed < Unlock_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Brake_Signal_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage lock-up when transmission oil temperature exceeds limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall unlock the torque converter clutch when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Max_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Max_Temp AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Activate_Thermal_Protection
IF Gear_Position < Third_Gear THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall engage lock-up only in higher gears.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall engage torque converter clutch when Gear_Position is greater than or equal to Fourth_Gear.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Position >= Fourth_Gear AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Gear_Position < Fourth_Gear THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Vehicle_Speed < Unlock_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Gear_Position_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage lock-up during high torque demand.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall unlock torque converter clutch when Engine_Torque exceeds Torque_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Torque > Torque_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Torque <= Torque_Limit AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Torque_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Gear_Position < Third_Gear THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage lock-up during system faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall release torque converter clutch when TCU_Fault_Status is active.

L4_requirements: IF TCU_Fault_Status = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCU_Fault_Status = FALSE AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Gear_Position < Third_Gear THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable lock-up during efficient operating conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall engage torque converter clutch when engine operates within efficiency zone.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed BETWEEN Efficiency_Min_RPM AND Efficiency_Max_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Engine_Speed > Efficiency_Max_RPM THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Speed < Efficiency_Min_RPM THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage lock-up during gear transitions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall release torque converter clutch when Shift_Command is active.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Command = Active THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Shift_Command = None AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Gear_Position_Change = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Gear_Position < Third_Gear THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable lock-up during limp-home mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disengage torque converter clutch when TCU_State equals Limp_Mode.

L4_requirements: IF TCU_State = Limp_Mode THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCU_State != Limp_Mode AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF TCU_State = Limp_Mode THEN Maintain_TCC_Disengaged
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage lock-up when torque converter slip exceeds critical limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall unlock torque converter clutch when TCC_Slip exceeds Critical_Slip.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Critical_Slip THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip <= Critical_Slip AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF TCC_Slip_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip > Critical_Slip THEN Trigger_TCC_Diagnostic
IF Gear_Position < Third_Gear THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage lock-up when vehicle speed drops below safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall unlock torque converter clutch when Vehicle_Speed falls below Unlock_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed < Unlock_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Vehicle_Speed >= Unlock_Speed AND Gear_Position >= Fourth_Gear THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage lock-up during rapid acceleration events.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall unlock torque converter clutch when acceleration exceeds calibrated threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Acceleration > Acceleration_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Vehicle_Acceleration <= Acceleration_Limit AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Acceleration_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall engage lock-up only under optimal driving conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall engage torque converter clutch when engine speed, vehicle speed, and load satisfy calibrated limits.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed BETWEEN Lockup_Min_RPM AND Lockup_Max_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed AND Engine_Load < Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Engine_Load >= Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Speed > Lockup_Max_RPM THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
